docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED APR-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREYBRICK PARTNERS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAINZER & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREYBRICK PARTNERS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00, $5,851.23, WHICH IS REDUCED TO $5K BECAUSE OF SC LIMIT FOR CORP. ENTITY. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ENTERED INTO REAL ESTATE PURCHASE AGREEMENT AND PER PARAGRAPH 3.13.7. PLAINTIFF ENTITLED TO THE REMAINDER OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT OR PROVIDED TO LEASE AGREEMENT WITH TENANT JESSICA LEE IN PARAGRAPH 5. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MAINZER & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT GREYBRICK PARTNERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2022 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF MAINZER & ASSOCIATES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY FRANK MAINZER (MANAGER). DEFENDANT GREYBRICK PARTNERS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RYAN TAYLOR (MANAGER). BOTH PARTIES STIPULATED TO ALLOW THEIR CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2022 - JUDGMENT.
